# BaseRadar

BaseRadar is a crypto ecosystem intelligence platform that tracks token velocity and momentum across Base, Solana, and Ethereum ecosystems.

## What it does
- Tracks cross-chain token velocity (0–100 score) using DexScreener, Zora, and PumpFun data
- Surfaces tokens gaining momentum before price moves
- Publishes daily ecosystem rankings and movers
- Free daily intelligence, updated every 60 seconds

## Key pages
- / — Homepage with daily movers and ecosystem overview
- /rankings — Full ecosystem velocity rankings
- /ecosystems — Ecosystem-level momentum comparison (Solana vs Base vs Ethereum)
- /today — Today's top movers by velocity score
- /compare — Side-by-side ecosystem comparison
- /blog — Research and intelligence reports
- /methodology — How velocity scoring works

## Data sources
DexScreener, Zora, PumpFun

## Update frequency
Every 60 seconds (ISR)

## RSS feed
https://baseradar.app/rss.xml

## JSON feed
https://baseradar.app/feed.json

## Sitemap
https://baseradar.app/sitemap.xml

## Contact / related
https://botindex.dev — Advanced crypto intelligence API
